title: Activating a board footer
excerpt:
Good day, everyone. 
It does not appear to be working when I activate my board footer. 
Could someone please aid me?

posts.author: Quinton (Quinton)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good day, everyone.

It does not appear to be working when I activate my board footer.

Could someone please aid me?

Monday.com 21373×588 50.6 KB

Monday.com697×141 9.53 KB

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Quinton!

Have you tried loading in an incognito window & turning the monday.labs feature on and off in that window?

If that doesn’t do the trick, can you try adding a regular Number Column (not a mirrored Number Column or Formula Column) to the board and see if the sum shows up there?

It could be an issue with multi-level mirroring. To rule this out, adding a regular Status or Number Column and filling out the cells within that column will help see if the footer gets populated too or not.

Let us know how this goes!
